title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates:
Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juicy Chemistry Asia Pacific Associates!
